title: 空压站监控截图 > 夜班压降
ocr_text:
COMPRESSED AIR DASHBOARD
Header pressure: 615 kPa
Leak rate: 18%
Dryer pressure drop: 42 kPa
Recommended action: check receiver storage and dryer pressure drop before raising setpoint
caption: 空压站仪表盘显示夜班总管压力低于 620 kPa，泄漏率 18%，干燥机压降 42 kPa。建议先检查储气罐容量、干燥机压降和泄漏点，不要直接提高全厂压力设定。

metadata.source_reference: DOE compressed air sourcebook teaching fixture
